item	core/enum.TemplateValues.html	pub enum TemplateValues { Values(Vec<FieldValue>), UnsignedRange { start: u64, end_inclusive: u64, }, Generated { count: usize, generator: Arc<dyn Fn(usize) -> FieldValue + Send + Sync>, }, }

item	core/trait.Layer.html	pub trait Layer: Any + Send + Sync + Debug { // Required methods fn schema(&self) -> &'static LayerSchema; fn clone_box(&self) -> Box<dyn Layer>; fn as_any(&self) -> &(dyn Any + 'static); fn as_any_mut(&mut self) -> &mut (dyn Any + 'static); fn field(&self, name: &str) -> Option<FieldValue>; fn set_field( &mut self, name: &str, value: FieldValue, ) -> Result<(), FieldError>; // Provided methods fn validate_required_fields(&self) -> Result<(), FieldError> { ... } fn protocol_id(&self) -> ProtocolId { ... } fn normalize(&mut self) { ... } }
item	core/trait.LayerCodec.html	pub trait LayerCodec: Send + Sync + Debug { // Required methods fn protocol_id(&self) -> ProtocolId; fn encode( &self, layer: &(dyn Layer + 'static), payload: &[u8], context: &LayerEncodeContext<'_>, ) -> Result<EncodedLayer, CodecError>; fn decode( &self, input: &[u8], context: &LayerDecodeContext<'_>, ) -> Result<DecodedLayerValue, CodecError>; fn make_layer( &self, fields: &BTreeMap<String, FieldValue>, ) -> Result<Box<dyn Layer>, CodecError>; // Provided methods fn accepts_decoded_protocol(&self, protocol: &ProtocolId) -> bool { ... } fn aliases(&self) -> &'static [&'static str] { ... } }

item	core/trait.ResponseMatcher.html	pub trait ResponseMatcher: Send + Sync + Debug { // Required method fn matches(&self, request: &Packet, response: &Packet) -> MatchResult; }

item	enum.CaptureError.html	#[non_exhaustive]pub enum CaptureError { Show 26 variants Io(Error), EmptyInput, UnrecognizedFormat { magic: [u8; 4], }, Truncated { context: &'static str, expected: usize, actual: usize, }, UnsupportedVersion { format: CaptureFileFormat, major: u16, minor: u16, }, InvalidData { format: CaptureFileFormat, reason: &'static str, }, SizeLimitExceeded { kind: &'static str, declared: u64, limit: usize, }, InvalidBlockLength { length: u32, }, BlockLengthMismatch { leading: u32, trailing: u32, }, CapturedLengthMismatch { declared: u32, actual: usize, }, OriginalLengthTooSmall { captured: u32, original: u32, }, TimestampOutOfRange { format: CaptureFileFormat, }, InvalidTimestampFraction { fraction: u32, denominator: u32, }, LinkTypeOutOfRange { link_type: u32, }, UndefinedInterface { interface: u32, available: usize, }, InterfaceLimit { limit: usize, }, MetadataBlockLimit { limit: usize, }, InterfaceLinkTypeMismatch { interface: u32, expected: u32, actual: u32, }, NoInterfaceForLinkType { link_type: u32, }, AmbiguousInterface { link_type: u32, }, MetadataNotRepresentable { format: CaptureFileFormat, field: &'static str, }, WrongWriterFormat { expected: CaptureFileFormat, actual: CaptureFileFormat, }, InvalidReplayTiming { mode: &'static str, value: f64, }, FrameLimitExceeded { actual: u64, limit: u64, }, StreamByteLimitExceeded { actual: u64, limit: u64, }, InvalidTimestampResolution { base: u8, exponent: u8, }, }
